channel.title: Usage Updates — kullanım limiti değişiklikleri
channel.description: Claude ve ChatGPT kullanım limiti resetleri, geçici artışları, ücretsiz erişimleri ve kredileri.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: 10 milyon aktif kullanıcı için ChatGPT Work ve Codex limitleri resetlendi
item.description: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “10M! New day, new usage reset for paid users of Codex and ChatGPT Work. Lands in the next hour. Enjoy.”

item.title: OpenAI — Kredi: OpenAI, ChatGPT Work hakkında paylaşım yapan ilk 10.000 kullanıcıya 100 dolar kredi veriyor
item.description: Greg Brockman (OpenAI): “We're doing the promotion again, except this time for ChatGPT Work: Tweet what you love about ChatGPT Work, claim $100 in free credits, get more work done. First 10k get the free tokens.”

item.title: Anthropic — Limit artışı: Claude Cowork ve Claude Code limitleri artırıldı (Haz–Ağu 2026 kampanyası)
item.description: Claude Code weekly limits were raised 50% through August 19. Cowork limits were doubled through August 5.

item.title: Anthropic — Limit artışı: Claude Code haftalık limitleri 19 Ağustos'a kadar %50 yüksek kalıyor
item.description: We're also keeping Claude Code weekly limits 50% higher, now through August 19, for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: ChatGPT Work ve Codex limitleri yine resetlendi: “Oops... I did it again”
item.description: “Oops... I did it again. Enjoy reset usage limits for all paid users for Codex and ChatGPT Work.”

item.title: Anthropic — Kredi: Fable 5 krediye geçerken Pro/Team Standard kullanıcılarına tek seferlik 100 dolar kredi
item.description: Anthropic gave Pro and Team Standard users a one-time $100 credit for Fable 5 after included access ended. Max and Team Premium users kept Fable 5 within 50% of their weekly limits.

item.title: Anthropic — Kredi: Claude, Fable 5 arızası sonrası fazla ücretlendirmeyi iade etti ve eşdeğer kredi verdi
item.description: A July 17 bug wrongly required usage credits to access Fable 5 on claude.ai and Claude Code for Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise users; Anthropic refunded any extra usage charged during the outage and added a matching credit to affected accounts.

item.title: Anthropic — Limit resetleme: 5 saatlik ve haftalık limitler tüm kullanıcılar için resetlendi — üst üste üçüncü hafta
item.description: Anthropic reset the 5-hour and weekly limits for all users for the third week in a row.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: 9 milyon aktif kullanıcı için Codex ve ChatGPT Work limitleri resetlendi
item.description: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Another reset for our Codex and ChatGPT Work users. Actually hit 9M active users way earlier today... Should have that sweet 100% weekly usage limit back in a few [minutes].”

item.title: OpenAI — Kredi: OpenAI, GPT-5.6 Sol hakkında paylaşım yapan ilk 10.000 kullanıcıya 100 dolar Codex kredisi veriyor
item.description: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “What if we gave you $100 in Codex credits if you tell us what you love about GPT-5.6 Sol or why you switched? Tweet it, claim your gift, enjoy more usage. First 10k get the free tokens.”

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: 8 milyon aktif kullanıcı için ChatGPT Work ve Codex limitleri resetlendi
item.description: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “We have reached 8M active users across Codex and ChatGPT Work. We are once again resetting the usage limits for all. And we continue to not have the 5h rate limit as well.”

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: 7 milyon kullanıcı için tüm Codex ve ChatGPT Work kullanıcılarına biriktirilebilir reset verildi
item.description: OpenAI added one banked reset to every Codex and ChatGPT Work account after reaching 7 million active users. Users could apply it whenever they chose.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit artışı: OpenAI, çıkarım optimizasyonu tasarruflarını Codex ve ChatGPT Work'e yansıttı: yaklaşık %10 daha fazla kullanım
item.description: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “We have landed inference optimizations and are passing down savings to all the subscriptions for GPT-5.6 Sol. That should result in around 10% more usage on its own.”

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: Reset düğmesi hatasının ardından 500.000 ChatGPT Work ve Codex kullanıcısına biriktirilebilir reset verildi
item.description: A reset-button bug affected fewer than 10% of users during a two-hour window. OpenAI gave a banked reset to all 500,000 accounts that pressed the button during that period.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit artışı: ChatGPT Plus, Pro ve Business'ta 5 saatlik limit geçici olarak kaldırıldı
item.description: “Temporarily removing the 5 hour usage limit restriction for all Plus, Business and Pro plans.” The change applied to Codex and ChatGPT Work; weekly limits remained in place.

item.title: Anthropic — Ücretsiz erişim: Claude Fable 5 erişimi ve %50 yüksek Claude Code haftalık limitleri 19 Temmuz'a uzatıldı
item.description: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: Hafta sonu ChatGPT Work ve Codex limitleri bir kez daha resetlendi
item.description: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Introducing... another usage limit reset for all our ChatGPT Work and Codex users. Should land over next 30 minutes... we have never seen traffic increase so quickly.”

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: ChatGPT Work ve Codex limitleri yine resetlendi, aynı gün ikinci reset sözü verildi
item.description: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Hello beautiful people! We have reset usage limits across Codex and ChatGPT Work. And another one will come later in the day.”

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: GPT-5.6 Sol talep artışı öncesi ChatGPT Work ve Codex limitleri resetlendi
item.description: “Enjoy a full reset of your usage limits for ChatGPT Work and Codex. Propagating in the next hour.”

item.title: Anthropic — Limit resetleme: “Tüm kullanıcılar için 5 saatlik ve haftalık limitleri resetledik.”
item.description: “We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users.”

item.title: Anthropic — Ücretsiz erişim: Tüm ücretli paketlerde Claude Fable 5 erişimi 12 Temmuz'a uzatıldı
item.description: We're extending access to Claude Fable 5 on all paid plans through July 12.

item.title: Anthropic — Limit artışı: İki katına çıkarılan Claude Cowork limitleri 5 Ağustos'a uzatıldı
item.description: We're extending doubled Cowork usage limits through August 5, so you can delegate bigger work to Claude. Read more: https://claude.com/blog/cowork-web-mobile/

item.title: Anthropic — Limit artışı: Claude Code haftalık limitleri 13 Temmuz'a kadar %50 artırıldı
item.description: Claude Code weekly limits were raised 50% through July 13.

item.title: Anthropic — Limit resetleme: 5 saatlik ve haftalık limitler tüm kullanıcılar için resetlendi
item.description: “We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users.”

item.title: Anthropic — Ücretsiz erişim: Claude Fable 5, haftalık limitin %50'sine kadar ücretli paketlere dahil edildi
item.description: Fable 5 was included on Pro, Max, Team and Enterprise plans at no extra charge, using up to 50% of the weekly limit. The offer ran through July 19.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: Codex limitleri tamamen resetlendi, bir de biriktirilebilir reset eklendi
item.description: OpenAI reset Codex usage limits and added one banked reset after reports of unusually fast usage drain. It said several smaller issues had compounded for some users.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: Olay incelemesi sırasında Codex limitleri herkes için sıfırdan resetlendi
item.description: OpenAI reset Codex limits for all users while investigating reports of unusually fast usage drain. Existing banked resets remained available.

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: Hızlı limit tükenmesi incelenirken tüm kullanıcılara Codex reseti verildi
item.description: We are giving all Codex users a usage reset on the house. Should be showing in your accounts in the next few hours. We have applied some mitigations, but our investigation hasn't shown users being impacted at large. We are continuing to monitor the situation.

item.title: Anthropic — Limit resetleme: Tüm paketlerde 5 saatlik ve haftalık limitler herkes için resetlendi
item.description: ClaudeDevs: "Update: we've gone ahead and reset 5-hour and weekly usage limits for everyone, across all plans. Enjoy your weekend!"

item.title: OpenAI — Limit resetleme: Çifte reset: tam Codex reseti ve bir biriktirilebilir reset
item.description: Dearest gentle codexer. We did a sneaky double reset. Not only do you get a full reset on us. But you are also getting one into the reset bank to use at your own leisure. Enjoy
